name: Smoked Paprika and Rosemary Marinade
directions: Whisk all the ingredients together.
Place in a bowl with the food to be marinated, cover with cling film and leave in the fridge overnight.
Pour off excess marinade before grilling, roasting or frying.

name: Pixie Butter
directions: In a medium sized bowl combine the hard boiled egg yolks, white sugar, orange juice and unsalted butter.
Blend until well mixed.
place small mounds on the bread plates.

name: Lasagna Pasta Rolls With Shaved Ham and Parmesan
directions: you will also need.
1 packet fresh lasagne sheets.
cut the lasagne sheets in half.
place a handful of ham and cheese along the length of each sheet, a couple of cm in from the edge.
roll tightly.
cut each roll in half and place in a baking dish.
place the garlic and cream in a large frypan, and stir over medium heat until it comes to a gentle boil.
add the tomatoes, wine, mushrooms and olives.
pour over the pasta rolls and sprinkle with mozzarella.
bake at 180 degrees for 30 minutes.
remove from the oven and decorate top with chopped fresh tomato, flat-leaf parsley and basil.

name: Crumbed Scallops
directions: Heat oven to 200c.
Heat 1/2 the oil in a frypan and cook onion & garlic until soft and golden.
In a bowl mix together breadcrumbs, roughly chopped cashews, parsley, lemon rind, parmesan, capers, red pepper and the cooked onion & garlic.
Dry the scallops with a paper towel then.
toss with the breadcrumb mix, pepper & salt and remaining oil.
Place on an oven proof serving dish and cook.
for 8 mins until the sides are bubbling and the crumbs are golden brown.

name: Grilled Sardines With Spring Onion & Cucumber Salad
directions: Cut cucumber into cubes and place in bowl.
Finely slice spring onion and red chilli and add to bowl.
Add olive oil, white wine vinegar, dried mint (approx 1/4 cup finely cut if using fresh) and salt to taste.
Mix ingredients well.
Halve french stick lengthwise and cut to desired serving size widthwise.
Place a sardine on top of each piece of bread.
Top with mozzarella cheese and grill until melted and bread crispy.
Plate bread and sardines and serve with fresh green salad (I used a mix or rocket, endive, chard and spinach but feel free to use whatever!) drizzled with cucumber and spring onion mix.
Enjoy!
